app.name: Korea Toilet Sharing Service
app.description: A trust-based sharing service to find restroom locations and door passcodes of Korean commercial buildings on a map
app.demoBanner: Demo mode — set Firebase environment variables to see real data

map.geoDenied: Location permission denied. Try searching by address instead.
map.searchNoKey: Address search is unavailable because the Kakao REST API key is not set.

building.disputed: Under review — temporarily hidden due to a report

reveal.confirmBody: By revealing the passcode, you will be recorded as having used this restroom at this time. Continue?
reveal.demo: This is a demo passcode (not a real service)
reveal.error: Failed to reveal. Please try again later.
reveal.needSetup: The Firebase Admin key is not configured on the server yet.
reveal.noCredit: You are out of free reveals and points. Contribute reports to earn points!

etiquette.title: Etiquette Pledge
etiquette.p1: I will keep the restroom clean.
etiquette.p2: I will respect the businesses in the building and cause no harm.
etiquette.p3: I agree that a viewing record (who, when, where) is kept whenever I reveal a passcode.

login.title: Sign in
login.desc: Signing in is required to reveal passcodes and submit reports.
login.tagline: Find the nearest restroom and its passcode in 30 seconds.
login.kakaoError: Kakao sign-in failed. Please try again.
login.needSetup: Sign-in will be available once Firebase environment variables are set.

report.title: Report a passcode
report.loginFirst: Please sign in to submit a report.
report.locationDesc: Location description (e.g. next to the 2F stairs)
report.needSetup: Reporting will be available once Firebase environment variables are set.

my.title: My page
my.historyNote: Viewing records are treated as using the restroom at that time.
my.loginFirst: Sign in to see your points and viewing history.
my.nicknameDesc: Only your nickname is shown to other users and owners.

culture.title: Korea's Restroom Passcode Culture
culture.intro: Most restrooms in Korean commercial buildings are locked with passcode door locks. The passcode is usually shared only with customers of the shops inside. This service was built to lower that barrier.
culture.s1b: Building managers and shops install door locks to reduce cleaning burdens and protect facilities. The passcode is often printed on receipts, or you have to ask the staff.
culture.s2t: How do I use this service?
culture.s2b: Find a nearby building on the map, sign in, and tap 'Show passcode' to see community-reported passcodes. Every reveal is recorded, so please use it responsibly.
culture.s3b: Keep the restroom clean and do not disturb the businesses. If a passcode is wrong, tap 'It was wrong'; if you learn a new one, please report it.

owner.title: Owner Dashboard
owner.comingSoon: Owner verification and view-log access arrive in Phase 4. Verified owners can see who viewed their building's passcode, register the official passcode, and opt out.

pin.question: Add a pin at this location?
pin.needAnyPw: Enter at least one passcode (men's or women's)
pin.needReveal: Reveal a passcode first to rate it
pin.empty: No pins yet. Tap the map to add the first one!

gate.locationBody: We need your current location to find restrooms near you. You must allow location access to use this service.
gate.deniedBody: Open the lock (site settings) icon in your browser's address bar, set Location to 'Allow', then tap Check again.

live.title: Live Reveal Feed
live.desc: See in real time who revealed which building's passcode. Every reveal is stored as a record.
